context_for_next_testing_agent: business-brain-merge-ingest patch verified correct in local code. After deployment, verify: 1) source_runs show 'completed' or 'partial' status, 2) canonical tables (customers, deals, invoices) have data. The fix uses DATASET_PLAN to scope Merge API calls by category.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Old edge function code fetched ALL Merge API endpoints (/crm/v1/*, /accounting/v1/*) for EVERY connector regardless of category. Xero (accounting) connector tried to fetch /crm/v1/companies → Merge API returned 404 → Hard failure → No data ingested.
rca_of_the_issue.evidence: Live source_runs table shows ALL recent runs failed with 'Merge request failed (404) /crm/v1/companies:' for both accounting:xero and crm:hubspot connectors.
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Local code now uses DATASET_PLAN object that maps each category (crm/accounting/marketing) to only its relevant endpoints. fetchDatasetsForCategory() uses DATASET_PLAN[category] to fetch only applicable endpoints.
rca_of_the_issue.deployment_status: LOCAL CODE PATCHED - NOT DEPLOYED (Supabase CLI unavailable in container)
